pluginDescription: Pick a quieter transmit audio frequency before an accepted autocall starts.
autoSelectIdleFrequencyDesc: When any automatic-call proposal is accepted, first inspect the source receive slot and move to a quieter transmit audio frequency before starting the automatic call.
idleFrequencyMinHzDesc: Lowest transmit audio offset, in Hz, that automatic idle-frequency selection may use. This is an FT8/FT4 audio offset range, not the radio RF frequency.
idleFrequencyMaxHzDesc: Highest transmit audio offset, in Hz, that automatic idle-frequency selection may use. FT8/FT4 offsets are limited to 0-3000 Hz; this is not the radio RF frequency.
